note: Historical commits in this workspace don't carry the canonical `Audits: spec-diff PASS, hostile PASS, tests PASS` trailer because the trailer convention was adopted retroactively at P1.11 close-out. Rather than rewrite git history (destructive + breaks signatures), this file is the source of truth for each P1.N's three-audit verdict. The gate script (scripts/phase-1-gate.mjs) reads from here for check #12. Commits from P1.12 onward carry the trailer directly in the commit message.

verdicts.title: Templater agent scaffold (beacon pattern)
verdicts.notes: Scaffolded agents/templater/ matching beacon structure; hostile review fixed error-path coverage; 29-test baseline established.

verdicts.title: In-memory generateFromSpec
verdicts.notes: Added generateFromSpec() so templates can be produced entirely in memory without filesystem writes. Dead-variable cleanup on review.

verdicts.title: API-docs-to-MCP-server LangGraph pipeline
verdicts.notes: Implemented fetchApiDocs → synthesize → generateFiles → qualityGates → submitForReview node graph; extractJson hardened against string-embedded braces; 100-test vitest fixtures.

verdicts.title: Quality gates module (tsc + smoke + security)
verdicts.notes: In-memory CompilerHost + smoke gate via tsx subprocess + security lint + runQualityGates orchestrator. Hostile review closed path-traversal, stream buffer cap, process-group kill. 94% coverage on quality-gates.ts.

verdicts.title: Templater agent + scheduler integration
verdicts.notes: Registered templater_generate (Tue/Thu 03:00) and templater_audit (Sat 09:00) crons; staging-dir helper for @settlegrid/mcp resolution; 18-test coverage close-out.

verdicts.title: CANONICAL_50 rubric + seed from 1022 templates
verdicts.notes: 100-point rubric (readme/tools/schema/gates/deps/docker/category/novelty), Claude Sonnet tiebreaker with disk cache, 57 rubric tests at 100% line coverage, sum=4676.

verdicts.title: @settlegrid/skill package scaffold
verdicts.notes: Anthropic Skills v1 directory shape, package.json workspace marker, types.d.ts.

verdicts.title: SKILL.md body + three wrapper examples
verdicts.notes: monetize-this-mcp skill body; examples for fastmcp, REST, typescript-sdk; spec-diff fixes for generateServerCardBilling signature + 'placeholder' removal.

verdicts.title: Cursor rule variant (.cursorrules)
verdicts.notes: Stripped YAML frontmatter, inlined examples, 1788 words (< 3500).

verdicts.title: experimental/payment SEP draft
verdicts.notes: RFC-style SEP at 3036 words with 14 JSON blocks (all parse clean); error codes -32010 through -32013; JSON Schema + TypeScript defs.

verdicts.title: Codemod framework + sdk-version-bump
verdicts.notes: jscodeshift-based framework; 70 tests at 98.67% overall line coverage; per-file atomicity via tmpfile + rename; binder-guard for identifier rename safety; path-traversal hardened loadCodemod.
